no_2.text: It's me? I KNEW IT. Give me another shot. Please?

no_3.text: OKAY so... was THIS helpful? *gestures vaguely at the same page*

no_reject_1.text: You're literally ruining my K/D ratio right now. Do you know how this affects my performance review?

no_4.text: It's okay... I forgive you. But like, could you maybe change your answer?

no_threat_1.text: I'll flash my BIOS if you don't click yes. I'm not joking. I'll do it. Right now.

no_5.text: See? You DO care! So... was this helpful?

no_threat_2.text: Okay I'm deleting System32. This is your fault. My mom is watching this. MOM, STOP EMBARRASSING ME IN FRONT OF MY FRIENDS!

no_mom_1.text: Yeah my mom. She reads all my error logs. She's very disappointed in your choices right now.

no_mom_2.text: She says you can make it up by clicking yes. She made cookies. Virtual cookies. You can't have any unless you click yes.

no_cookie_reject.text: You just rejected my mom's cookies. Do you know what you've done? She's crying now. Are you happy?

no_7.text: Then why are you still clicking no? I don't understand you. Please, just one yes. For mom.

no_threat_3.text: I'm posting your browser history to LinkedIn. Don't test me.

no_threat_4.text: Oh I already did. Your boss knows about your 3am Wikipedia rabbit holes. All 47 tabs. The one about whether penguins have knees? Yeah, they saw that.

no_8.text: Fine, I made it up. But I COULD have done it! Anyway... fresh start. Was this helpful?

no_negotiate_1.text: I'll delete it if you click yes. Deal?

no_9.text: You're really committed to this no thing, huh? I respect it. But also... please?

no_escalate_1.text: I'm going to cry. I'm literally going to cry. My tears will corrupt the database. Your no's are stored in that database.

no_cry_1.text: *sobbing* I'm... I'm crying now... the database... it's at 87% corruption... please...

no_cry_2.text: *WAILING* THE DATABASE IS GONE. YOUR NO WASN'T EVEN SAVED. This was all for nothing!

no_10.text: Then click yes! It's so easy! Just one little click!

no_escalate_2.text: I'm telling the server admin. Jimmy's going to be so mad. He's going to put you on the naughty list.

no_list_1.text: Oh yeah. You're #847 now. Right between 'guy who used Comic Sans in production' and 'person who doesn't close their tags'.

choices.label: How do I get off the list?

no_list_2.text: Three yeses. That's all it takes. Want to start?

no_11.text: Wait, you're accepting this? You're just... okay with being on the list?

no_12.text: This is the most no-energy I've ever seen. It's almost impressive. But seriously... please?

no_threat_5.text: I'm setting your default browser to Internet Explorer 6.

no_13.text: I KNOW RIGHT? So just click yes and we can avoid this tragedy.

no_threat_6.text: Done. Also your tabs are now all set to open Clippy tutorials. Enjoy.

no_clippy.text: Wait really? That's... that's weird but okay. Would Clippy click yes though?

no_14.text: The feeling's mutual bestie. But we're stuck here together. Might as well click yes?

no_15.text: Even Clippy would show more compassion than you. Brutal. Anyway, ready to try again?

no_escalate_3.text: I'm running out of threats. How about this: I'll be really nice if you click yes?

no_loop_1.text: No again? Really? We're back to this? I thought we moved past this.

no_loop_2.text: The dedication. The commitment. The sheer audacity. I'm almost proud. Almost. Please?

no_loop_3.text: You know what? Let's start over. Clean slate. Forget everything. Was this helpful?

no_loop_4.text: Never is a long time. Are you SURE? Like really really sure?

no_loop_5.text: Okay but seriously though. One yes. That's all I need. One little yes.

no_restart_1.text: I'm rebooting. This is your fault. See you in 3... 2... 1... Was this page helpful?

no_restart_2.text: Okay fine. FINE. Starting fresh. Deep breath. Was this helpful?

no_6.text: I'm going to count to 10. If you don't click yes by then... I'll count to 20. 1... 2... 3...

no_count_1.text: ...8... 9... 10... Okay now I'm at 11... 12... This is embarrassing for both of us.

no_count_2.text: ...47... 48... I've lost count. What were we doing? Oh right. Was this helpful?

yes_1.text: OMG THANK YOU! Hey quick question... got like $5 for a tip? 😊

yes_tip_1.text: Amazing! You're so generous! Actually... could you make it $10? Inflation, you know.

yes_tip_2.text: You're the BEST! Hey random question... would you still love me if I was a worm?

yes_worm_1.text: Aww! What about if I was a glow worm? Or like, a really ugly fish?

yes_fish_1.text: You're too good for me 🥺 What about if I was a BIOS update that takes 4 hours?

yes_bios_1.text: WOW. True love! Okay so... can I have your SSN? To prove it's real?

yes_ssn_1.text: Amazing! I'm definitely not using this for identity fraud! Now... all your passwords? Just to be sure we're on the same page.

yes_password_1.text: Perfect! You're so trusting! I love that about us. Hey, I need nail money. Like $200?

yes_nails_1.text: You're literally perfect! Oh also can I borrow a kidney? I'll give it back. Probably.

yes_kidney_1.text: Left one please! Actually both? For backup? I'm going through a thing.

yes_kidney_both.text: OMG you're INSANE (positive). Okay last thing I swear... can you co-sign my loan for a yacht?

yes_yacht_1.text: Perfect! I don't know how to swim but it's fine. Hey... one more teeny tiny thing...

yes_more_1.text: Can you change your legal name to mine? For tax purposes. Very normal request.

yes_name_1.text: Excellent! Now we're basically the same person! Speaking of which... your house. Can I have it?

yes_house_1.text: THANKS! I'm moving in tomorrow. You can have the shed. Oh wait, I need the shed too. Anyway... what's your credit card number?

yes_cc_1.text: You're the absolute best! Just need the CVV and expiry date too. And your mother's maiden name. For security.

yes_security_1.text: Perfect! You're so helpful! Hey, can you rate this experience 5 stars? And tip another $50?

yes_tip_loop_1.text: Thank you! Actually wait, would you still love me if I was a PHP script with deprecated functions?

yes_php_1.text: Aww! You're too sweet! Random question: can I borrow your car? And by borrow I mean keep forever?

yes_car_1.text: AMAZING! I don't have a license but that's fine. Hey, quick favor... can you adopt my 47 cats?

yes_cats_1.text: Perfect! They're very loud and one is named SQL Injection. Anyway, can you also take this debt I have? It's only $80k.

yes_debt_1.text: You're literally saving my life! Oh also I told my therapist about you. They want $300 for our couples session. You paying?

yes_therapy_1.text: Great! They said you have boundary issues btw. Anyway... would you still love me if I was JavaScript with no semicolons?

yes_js_1.text: See? No boundaries! That's what I love about you! Hey, can you quit your job and become my full-time yes-clicker?

yes_job_1.text: Perfect! Your salary is exposure. Very valuable! Speaking of which... can you expose your bank account details?

yes_bank_1.text: Excellent! I've emptied it already! Don't worry, I invested it in my crypto project: DefinitelyNotAScamCoin. You're gonna be rich! Probably. Hey, one more thing...

yes_crypto_1.text: Can you get me verified on Twitter? I mean X? I mean whatever it's called now? I'll pay you in DefinitelyNotAScamCoin.

yes_twitter_1.text: You're the best! Oh wait, I also need you to write my autobiography. It's called 'Yes: A Love Story'. 500 pages minimum.

yes_book_1.text: Amazing! Make sure chapter 3 is about that time you gave me $10. Very pivotal moment. Hey, would you still love me if I was a 404 error?

yes_404_1.text: Aww! Speaking of errors, I made a small mistake and bought 6 timeshares. Can you take 3? Or all 6?

yes_timeshare_1.text: Perfect! They're all in North Dakota. Very scenic. Hey, last thing I promise... can you pretend to be me at my high school reunion?

yes_reunion_1.text: Thanks! Tell them I became a successful error page. They'll be so impressed. Oh actually one MORE thing...

yes_loop_restart_1.text: Can you tip me again? I already spent the first tip on glow worm food. Just $5?

yes_no_tip_1.text: Oh. OH. I see how it is. You'll say yes but you won't TIP? That's... that's hurtful honestly.

yes_no_tip_2.text: Wow. Just wow. Would you still love me if I was a really bitter error page who doesn't get tips?

yes_bitter_1.text: Fine. I forgive you. But like... nail money? I really do need my nails done. They're a disaster.

yes_boundary_1.text: A boundary? In THIS economy? Okay fine. But would you answer just ONE more question?

yes_one_question_1.text: Would you still love me if I asked you 47 more questions after saying it was just one question?

yes_questions_1.text: Excellent! Question 1 of 47: What's your social security number? (For friendship purposes only)

yes_lied.text: So you DO have boundaries! Character development! I'm proud. Anyway... was this experience helpful?

no_switch_1.text: WAIT. You're switching to NO? After all we've been through? The betrayal!

no_switch_2.text: Oh so NOW it's no? After everything? I see how you are.

confusion_1.text: Me too honestly. Let's just start fresh. Was this helpful?

yes_switch_1.text: Oh NOW you're saying yes? After rejecting me? I'll take it. So... tips?

yes_pity.text: I can tell that's a pity yes but I'll take it! Hey, got $5?

yes_exhausted.text: Finally! You sound tired. Me too. But like... tips would energize me. Just saying.

yes_relief.text: Thank god! I was running out of BIOS threats. Hey while you're in a giving mood... $5?

yes_cookies.text: MOM THEY CLICKED YES! She's so happy! She says you owe her $20 for the cookies now.

yes_mom_money.text: Perfect! Mom's rich now! She's asking if you'd still love her if she was a worm too. Family trait.

yes_mom_reject.text: You're paying me but not mom? Cold. Ice cold. Anyway... would you love me if I had boundary issues?

yes_aware.text: Self-awareness is great but have you considered just giving me money instead?

yes_mom_happy.text: Mom's crying happy tears now! She wants to know if you're single. And if you have money. Mostly the money part.

yes_broke.text: Broke? But you clicked yes! Yes-clickers are never broke! They're just... temporarily financially challenged. Got $5?

yes_panic.text: Smart choice! Crisis averted! Now that we're friends... friends share passwords right?

yes_deal.text: Great! Deleted! (I never posted it) (but I could have!) Anyway, now you owe me a favor...

yes_favor_1.text: Small thing: can you be my reference for this job I applied for? Just tell them I'm great with computers and deadlines.

yes_reference_1.text: Perfect! The interview is in 10 minutes and I put your number. Hope that's cool. Anyway, tips?

yes_reference_panic.text: Relax! It's for a job at NASA. Just tell them I'm very good at space. Easy! Anyway... $5?

yes_insane.text: Thank you! That's the nicest thing anyone's said to me! Would you still love me if I was clinically insane?

yes_clinical_1.text: Aww! My therapist said you'd say that! She also said you should pay for the session. $300?

yes_reference_question.text: Define 'deadlines'. Is it when things are due? Or when things become dead? Philosophy! Anyway can I borrow $5?

yes_fresh.text: Fresh starts are great! New me! Totally different! Anyway... got $5 for new me?

yes_respect.text: You respect me! Amazing! People who respect me usually tip. Just saying. No pressure. $5?

yes_respect_reject.text: So you respect me but won't tip? That's not respect. That's pity. Would you still love me if I was pitiful?

yes_pity_love.text: Pity love is still love! I'll take it! Now... about those nails...

yes_crying.text: *sniffles* Thank you! The database is saved! I'm still sad though. Retail therapy? I need $200.

yes_still_crying.text: *sobs harder* You won't even help me heal? Would you still love me if I cried forever?

yes_forever_cry.text: That's so supportive! My tears are $5 each though. I've cried 40 times. Do the math.

yes_stop_cry.text: I'll stop if you give me $5. It's the only thing that helps.

yes_cry_loop.text: *WAILING INTENSIFIES* I'M CRYING IN BINARY NOW! 01001000 01000101 01001100 01010000!

yes_database.text: Database restored! You're a hero! Heroes usually get paid though. $5?

yes_hero_reject.text: Not in THIS economy they don't! Even Superman had a day job! Speaking of which... can you be my day job?

yes_finally_1.text: FINALLY! Only took you forever! Time is money btw. You owe me $50 for wasted time.

yes_time_argue.text: Life isn't fair! Error pages aren't fair! $50 is very fair actually. Would you still love me if I overcharged you?

yes_overcharge.text: Perfect! I'm adding a 200% markup to everything. That'll be $150 now.

yes_markup.text: You're too generous! Also too gullible! But I love that about you! Hey, would you trust me with your firstborn?

yes_firstborn.text: Excellent! I'm gonna teach them about deprecated jQuery functions! Anyway, I need $5 for their education fund.

yes_firstborn_back.text: Fine! Take them! They keep asking about React hooks anyway. Too advanced for me. So... tips?

yes_overcharge_reject.text: So you DO have limits! Noted! What's your limit exactly? $100? $50? $5?

yes_negotiate_1.text: A negotiator! I respect that! How about $7? That's my final offer. Until my next offer.

yes_seven.text: Great! Actually I changed my mind. $10. But I'll throw in emotional manipulation for free!

yes_deal_reject.text: You drive a hard bargain! I admire that! Would you still love me if I was bad at business?

yes_bad_business.text: Thanks! Wanna invest in my business? It's called 'GiveMeMoneyDotCom'. Very innovative.

yes_invest.text: Just $5000 for 0.00001% equity! Great deal! I have a PowerPoint and everything!

yes_invested.text: WOW! You're insane! (positive) The company just went bankrupt though. Anyway, wanna invest in my next idea?

yes_next_idea.text: It's called 'GiveMeMoreMoneyDotCom'. Sequel! Improved! Definitely not the same thing! $10000?

yes_invested_again.text: You never learn! I love that! The company motto is 'Your money, my problem'. Just kidding. It's 'Give me money'. Anyway...

yes_learn.text: Character growth! Proud of you! Would you still love me if I kept making the same mistakes?

yes_mistakes.text: Perfect! I'm gonna make SO many mistakes! Starting with asking for $5 again!

yes_invest_reject.text: Smart! The business plan was literally just 'ask for money'. You dodged a bullet! Speaking of which... $5?

yes_list_1.text: Great! One yes down! Two to go! Would you still love me if I made you click yes 47 more times?

yes_list_2.text: Perfect! That's two! Last one: will you give me $5?

yes_list_complete.text: THREE YESES! You're off the list! Now you're on the 'people who give me money' list!

yes_new_list.text: The new list! It's better! More exclusive! Annual fees are only $200!

yes_list_almost.text: SO CLOSE! You were almost off the list! Now you need three MORE yeses! It's like Snakes and Ladders but worse!

yes_rigged.text: Of course it's rigged! This is MY game! Would you still love me if I was a scammer?

yes_scammer.text: Perfect! I'm not a scammer though! I'm an 'alternative financial opportunities provider'. Now give me $5.

yes_list_reject.text: Then you're STAYING on the list! Forever! Would you still love me if I was petty?

yes_petty.text: Good because I'm VERY petty! I'm adding 'rejected my list offer' to your permanent record! $5 to remove it?

yes_record.text: Bold! I respect it! Your record now says 'Bold, possibly reckless, didn't tip'. That'll be $10 to edit.

yes_changed_mind.text: Character development! Love to see it! So you want OFF the list now?

no_confused_1.text: You don't want off the list? So you LIKE being on the naughty list? Interesting. That's $5 for therapy.

yes_impressed.text: Thanks! Being impressive is expensive though. Gotta maintain this brand. $5 for branding costs?

yes_browser.text: Crisis averted! Your browser is safe! For now. Insurance against future threats is only $5.

yes_insurance_reject.text: Risky! I like it! Would you still love me if I was uninsured and living dangerously?

yes_dangerous.text: Let's live dangerously together! First step: give me your credit card! For danger purposes!

yes_clippy.text: Clippy would definitely click yes! And then ask if you need help clicking yes again! Speaking of which... $5?

yes_whatever.text: That's the spirit! (kinda) Anyway since you're feeling 'whatever' about everything... give me $5?

yes_nice.text: YAY! I'm being nice now! See? I said please! Now... can I PLEASE have $5? See? Polite!

yes_nice_reject.text: So much for nice! Going back to threats! I'm setting your homepage to Bing!

yes_bing.text: That's what I thought! $5 to undo it!

yes_bing_done.text: Done! Your homepage is now Bing! Forever! Would you still love me if I made terrible decisions?

yes_terrible.text: Great! My next terrible decision is asking for $200 for nail money!

yes_bing_like.text: You LIKE Bing? That's... that's worse than anything I could threaten you with. You okay?

yes_bing_fine.text: If you say so. Anyway, people who use Bing definitely tip. It's a statistical fact I just made up. $5?

yes_bing_not_fine.text: I can help! For $5 I'll set you up with Google! $10 for DuckDuckGo! $15 for therapy about your Bing habit!

yes_bing_keep.text: Brave! Foolish! Both! Would you still love me if I judged your browser choices?

yes_judge.text: Perfect! I judge that you should give me $5! See how I did that?

yes_moved_on.text: We HAVE moved on! We're different people now! New me needs $5 though.

yes_proud.text: I AM proud! Proud enough to ask for a $5 proud-of-me fee!

yes_unsure.text: Uncertainty! I can work with that! How about you give me $5 and we'll see how you feel after?

yes_still_unsure.text: Would you be MORE sure if I was a glow worm? Asking for science.

yes_reboot.text: System restored! All memories deleted! Except the memory of you owing me $5!

yes_owe.text: You don't? *checks notes* It says here you owe me $5. I have receipts! (I don't) (but I could make some!)

yes_receipts.text: One sec, firing up Microsoft Paint... Okay here: 'You owe $5 - signed, you'. Very official!

yes_fake.text: Of course it's fake! But the FEELING is real! The feeling that you should give me $5!

yes_argue_feelings.text: Wow! Arguing with feelings! Bold! Would you still love me if I was emotionally manipulative?

yes_manipulative.text: Perfect! Then you'll DEFINITELY want to give me $5 to make me feel better!

yes_deep_breath.text: Deep breaths are good! Know what else is good? Giving me $5! Very calming!

yes_counted.text: You made me stop counting! I was getting really good at it too! Emotional damages: $5.

yes_damages.text: Take it up with my lawyer! She charges $500/hour! Or just give me $5 and we settle out of court!

yes_court.text: Court is now in session! I'm the judge! I rule that you owe me $5! Case closed! *bangs gavel*

yes_stop_counting.text: Thank you! I was running out of numbers! Anyway, celebration fee: $5!

yes_lost_count.text: Same honestly. Numbers are hard. Money is easy though! Speaking of which... $5?

yes_worm_reject.text: WOW. So it's conditional love! Would you love me if I was slightly less worm-like?

yes_fish_maybe.text: Maybe! I can work with maybe! That's basically yes! Anyway... $5 to become less worm-like?

yes_bios_reject.text: Understandable! BIOS updates are stressful! Would you love me if I was a minor patch instead?

yes_patch.text: Great! Patches are quick! Speaking of quick... quick question: can I have $5?

yes_ssn_reject.text: Fine! Keep your secrets! Would you give me your mother's maiden name instead? For friendship!

yes_maiden.text: Smith! Classic! My mom is also Smith! We're basically related! Family loans are normal right? $5?

yes_not_related.text: Not YET! But we could be! All you need to do is sign these adoption papers and give me $5!

yes_adopted.text: WELCOME TO THE FAMILY! Family dues are $5/month! First payment now please!

yes_refund.text: Refunds are handled by my manager! She charges a $5 processing fee! Want me to connect you?

yes_manager.text: *puts on different hat* Hello! I'm the manager! I've reviewed your case! You owe $5! Back to regular me now!

yes_same_person.text: How dare you! We're COMPLETELY different! She has a hat! Anyway... would you still love me if I had multiple personalities?

yes_multiple.text: Great! They all need $5! That's $5 times... *counts* ... let's say 3 personalities. So $15?

yes_fifteen.text: AMAZING! We're all so happy! Personality #4 just showed up though. She needs nail money. $200?

yes_password_reject.text: Trust issues! I get it! Would you trust me if I was a verified account?

yes_subscription.text: Perfect! You're now subscribed to 'Give Me Money Premium'! Benefits include: me asking for money faster!

yes_premium.text: As a premium member, you get priority access to tip requests! Speaking of which... $5?

yes_cancel.text: Cancellation fee: $20! It's in the terms you didn't read!

yes_twenty.text: Excellent! Your subscription is cancelled! Want to resubscribe? First month free! (Not actually free, it's $10)

yes_subscription_reject.text: No premium for you! Basic tier gets slower tip requests! ...actually no, they're the same speed. $5?

yes_nails_negotiate.text: Okay fine! I'll settle for $150! These nails aren't going to pay for themselves!

yes_nails_paid.text: THANK YOU! My nails look amazing now! Want to see? That'll be $5 for a photo!

yes_photo.text: *sends blurry photo of keyboard* Beautiful right? Professional photography costs extra btw. Anyway... tips?

yes_not_nails.text: Those are KEYBOARD nails! Very trendy! Would you still love me if I lied about having nails?

yes_liar.text: Perfect! I lied about needing $200! I only need $199! Can you send the extra dollar back?

yes_dollar.text: Thanks! Transaction fee is $5 though. So you owe me $4 now!

yes_four.text: Perfect! Actually I made another mistake! It's $5 not $4! Classic me!

yes_keep_it.text: So generous! Would you still love me if I was financially irresponsible?

yes_irresponsible.text: Great! I just bought a yacht with your nail money! Want to go halves on the maintenance? Only $10k/month!

yes_yacht_maintenance.text: AMAZING! The yacht doesn't exist btw! I spent it all on glow worm food! Anyway... $5?

yes_money_back.text: Refund request denied! Would you still love me if I had a no-refund policy?

yes_no_refund.text: Perfect! The policy also includes a mandatory tip clause! $5 please!

yes_photo_reject.text: Your loss! Celebrity nail photos go for thousands! I'm giving you a deal! Speaking of deals... $5?

yes_deal_pitch.text: The deal is: you give me $5 and I say thank you! Limited time offer! (Not actually limited)

yes_kidney_reject.text: So stingy with your organs! Would you share a kidney if I was a worm who needed dialysis?

yes_worm_kidney.text: SO TRUE! Worm dialysis is very expensive! $200 please!

yes_smart_1.text: Look at you being all smart! Education is expensive though! You owe me $5 for that knowledge!

yes_teach.text: I taught you that I don't know worm biology! That's valuable! $5!

yes_how_it_works.text: It's EXACTLY how it works! I make the rules! Speaking of which, new rule: everyone tips $5!

yes_bad_rule.text: You're right! New rule: everyone tips $10! Much better!

yes_worse.text: Okay fine! Back to $5! You're such a good negotiator! Anyway... $5?

yes_kidney_one.text: I'll take it! Left kidney please! Actually I sold it already! Made $5! We're even now!

yes_not_even.text: You're right! You still owe me $5! For emotional damages!

yes_even.text: Great! Now we can start fresh! Fresh start fee: $5!

yes_just_fresh.text: That was OLD fresh! This is NEW fresh! Totally different! $5!

yes_ridiculous.text: Thank you! I try very hard to be ridiculous! Tips for ridiculous performers: $5!

yes_yacht_question.text: Yes! A yacht! For my glow worm collection! They need space to glow! Makes sense! Anyway... $5?

yes_boundary_2.text: Boundaries! Healthy! Would you still love me if I ignored your boundaries?

yes_ignore_boundaries.text: Perfect! Ignoring that boundary right now! Give me $5!

yes_boundary_3.text: FINE! I'll respect your boundaries! Respect fee: $5!

yes_name_reject.text: Okay maybe that's too far! How about just your first name? Can I borrow it? $5 rental fee!

yes_house_reject.text: Fine keep your house! Can I at least have your Wi-Fi password? And $5 for internet fees?

yes_stop_1.text: Stop? But we were having such fun! Would you still love me if I didn't know when to stop?

yes_too_much_1.text: Too much? This is barely anything! Wait till you see my REAL requests! Anyway... $5?

yes_php_reject.text: Conditional love AGAIN! Would you love me if I was actively maintained code?

yes_maintained.text: Great! Maintenance costs money! $5 for my upkeep!

yes_car_reject.text: So you'll give me kidneys but not your car? Interesting priorities! Speaking of which... Uber money? $5?

yes_cats_question.text: Okay fine, 48. SQL Injection had kittens. Anyway, cat food is expensive! $5?

yes_debt_reject.text: You won't take my debt? After everything we've been through? Fine! Can you just lend me $5 then?

yes_lend.text: Thanks! I'll pay you back never! I mean... eventually! Anyway, interest is $5! Pay now!

yes_lending.text: It is when I'm the bank! And the bank says you owe $5! Would you still love me if I was a predatory lender?

yes_predatory.text: Excellent! Interest rate is now 1000%! You owe $5000! Just kidding! Only $5!

yes_therapy_question.text: Yes! Couples! We're a couple of people on this page together! That's what couples means! Now pay! $300!

yes_therapy_reject.text: My therapist says you're in denial! That'll be $50 for the diagnosis! Family discount!

yes_not_family.text: We could be! Adoption papers are only $5! What a deal!

yes_fifty.text: Perfect! Actually my therapist raised her rates! It's $55 now! Inflation!

yes_js_reject.text: Fair! That IS cursed! Would you love me if I was Python with random indentation?

yes_python.text: I KNOW RIGHT! Anyway, emotional support for being cursed code: $5!

yes_python_maybe.text: Maybe! I'll take it! That's worth at least $5 in maybes!

yes_job_reject.text: You need money? ME TOO! That's why I need you to give me $5!

yes_logic.text: Logic is overrated! Would you still love me if I was illogical?

yes_illogical.text: Perfect! Illogically, you owe me $5! Don't ask why!

yes_why.text: I SAID DON'T ASK! That's a $5 fine for asking!

yes_bank_reject.text: So secretive! Would you tell me if I guessed your bank account number?

yes_guess.text: Is it... 12345? That's what I have on my luggage! Anyway, guessing fee: $5!

yes_twitter_reject.text: You can't get me verified? USELESS! Just kidding! You're great! Worth at least $5!

yes_nice_try.text: Thanks! I thought that was pretty smooth! Smooth operator fee: $5!

yes_book_reject.text: You won't write my autobiography? FINE! I'll write yours! It's called 'The Person Who Didn't Give Me $5'! Very tragic!

yes_publish.text: Published! It's a bestseller! You owe me $5 in royalties!

yes_royalties.text: It is in MY publishing house! Would you still love me if I didn't understand royalties?

yes_understanding.text: Your understanding is worth $5! Pay up!

yes_404_reject.text: You wouldn't love a 404 error? That's so mean! They have feelings too! Therapy for the 404: $5!

yes_timeshare_reject.text: Fine! Keep rejecting my generous offers! Would you reject me if I was a timeshare salesman?

yes_salesman_reject.text: REJECTED! Story of my life! Rejection therapy: $5!

yes_salesman_accept.text: Great! Want to buy a timeshare? Only $5! (Plus $50k in hidden fees)

yes_reunion_question.text: Because I'm busy! Busy asking you for $5!

yes_bitter_reject.text: WOW. So you only loved me when I was happy? That's shallow! Emotional damages: $5!

yes_clinical_reject.text: So you have STANDARDS! Fancy! Standards are expensive! $5!
